text: Real financial integration: PayPal/crypto access for ASI
description:
Replace mocked economic system with real financial capabilities:
- PayPal API integration (multiple accounts for risk distribution)
- Crypto wallet integration (ETH/BTC for decentralized autonomy)
- Real cost tracking (Anthropic/Google API usage monitoring)
- Real revenue tracking (grant income, trading, social posting)
- Autonomy ratio dashboard (earned/consumed)
- Multiple accounts strategy for safety and experimentation

status.comment: Started with a concrete pipeline reliability slice linked to financial/content loop: fixed publish target resolution so actionable posts are not skipped by run-limit behavior (aim 862b2c32-afe0-41d7-acbf-e62e9a94eb15, done). Remaining work requires live payment/crypto API integration and credentials.
